# hbmame-xml-data

Auto-generated MAME hash XML converted from
[HBMAME](https://github.com/Robbbert/hbmame) by
[m0rb/hbmame-xml](https://github.com/m0rb/hbmame-xml).

**Do not edit by hand.** This branch is force-updated on every run
(single rolling commit); see the `latest` release for zipped
archives of each run.

- `machine-xml/` — one monolithic `<softwarelist>` per system.
- `romset-xml/<system>/<char>/<romset>.xml` — one bare
  `<software>` per file.

Last generated: 2026-06-14T02:14Z from HBMAME c25f0da0.
